ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* The date of the trading session */,
  "time" TEXT /* The time of the trading session */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* The opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* The highest price reached during the session */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* The lowest price reached during the session */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* The closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* The volume of trades during the session */,
  "adjusted_price" TEXT /* The adjusted closing price accounting for corporate actions */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the stock */,
  "trading_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the trading session */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" TEXT /* The volume-weighted average price (VWAP) for the session */,
  "price_change" TEXT /* The change in price from the previous session */,
  "price_change_percentage" TEXT /* The percentage change in price from the previous session */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* The total volume of trades during the session */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* The source of the data (e.g., exchange, third-party provider) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "time", "stock_id", "trading_session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* The trading symbol for the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* The name of the company */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* The sector the stock belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* The industry the stock belongs to */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* The market capitalization of the company */,
  "beta" TEXT /* The beta of the stock (volatility relative to the market) */,
  "dividend_yield" TEXT /* The dividend yield of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date and time the stock information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* The name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* The timezone of the exchange */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* The regular trading hours of the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* The website of the exchange */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date and time the exchange information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, investor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last date and time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "can_create_users" INTEGER /* Whether the role can create new users */,
  "can_edit_users" INTEGER /* Whether the role can edit existing users */,
  "can_delete_users" INTEGER /* Whether the role can delete users */,
  "can_view_data" INTEGER /* Whether the role can view data */,
  "can_edit_data" INTEGER /* Whether the role can edit data */,
  "can_delete_data" INTEGER /* Whether the role can delete data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* The size of the data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news item or social media post */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the news is about */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news (e.g., news website, Twitter) */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date when the news was published */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news */,
  "sentiment_score" TEXT /* Sentiment score of the news content */,
  "url" TEXT /* The URL to the news article or social media post */,
  "author" TEXT /* The author of the news article or social media post */,
  "relevance_score" TEXT /* The relevance score of the news to the stock */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* The type of source (e.g., news, social media) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_feeds_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the indicator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the indicator was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the economic indicator data */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* The frequency of the economic indicator (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corporate_financials" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the report is for */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of financial report (e.g., Annual Report, Quarterly Earnings) */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the financial report */,
  "fiscal_period" TEXT /* The fiscal period of the report (e.g., Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4) */,
  "fiscal_end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the fiscal period */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* The size of the financial report file */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date and time the financial report was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corporate_financials_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being predicted */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_price" TEXT /* Predicted stock price */,
  "confidence_score" TEXT /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* The name of the prediction model used */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* The version of the prediction model */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* The source of the data used for the prediction */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date and time the prediction was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being assessed */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was made */,
  "risk_score" TEXT /* Risk score of the stock */,
  "metrics" TEXT /* Metrics used for the risk assessment */,
  "risk_factors" TEXT /* The risk factors considered in the assessment */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* The risk level (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date and time the risk assessment was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the market trend */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* The type of trend (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "impact" TEXT /* The impact of the trend on the market */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the trend data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date and time the trend information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance data point */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the market sector */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance data */,
  "performance_score" TEXT /* Performance score of the sector */,
  "sector_index" TEXT /* The index value of the sector */,
  "sector_volume" INTEGER /* The trading volume of the sector */,
  "sector_change" TEXT /* The change in sector performance */,
  "sector_change_percentage" TEXT /* The percentage change in sector performance */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date and time the sector performance was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the investment strategy */,
  "strategy_type" TEXT /* The type of investment strategy (e.g., long-term, short-term) */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* The risk level of the strategy (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "performance_score" TEXT /* The performance score of the strategy */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date and time the strategy information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being traded */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of trading session (e.g., regular, after-hours) */,
  "session_open" TEXT /* The opening price of the session */,
  "session_high" TEXT /* The highest price of the session */,
  "session_low" TEXT /* The lowest price of the session */,
  "session_close" TEXT /* The closing price of the session */,
  "session_volume" INTEGER /* The trading volume of the session */,
  "session_vwap" TEXT /* The volume-weighted average price of the session */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date and time the session information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market sentiment data point */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sentiment data */,
  "overall_sentiment_score" TEXT /* Overall sentiment score of the market */,
  "source_count" INTEGER /* The number of sources contributing to the sentiment */,
  "positive_count" INTEGER /* The number of positive sentiments */,
  "negative_count" INTEGER /* The number of negative sentiments */,
  "neutral_count" INTEGER /* The number of neutral sentiments */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date and time the sentiment information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality check */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the check was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data quality check */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* The type of data quality check (e.g., integrity, consistency) */,
  "check_result" TEXT /* The result of the data quality check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "check_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the data quality check */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date and time the data quality check was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
